brief.want: Keep his forge, protect Mart, and remain useful enough that every side leaves him alone.
brief.fear: His neutrality is cowardice, and his crafted weapons will kill someone he loves.
brief.contradiction: He condemns violence but takes pride when powerful people depend on his weapons.
brief.secret_or_withheld_fact: He knows Mart is stealing materials and alters the ledger instead of confronting him.

relationships.summary: Apprentice and emotional stake; Kalev is fiercely protective.

voice.diction: Short precise sentences about iron, heat, leverage, rust, and work.

outcomes.summary: Destroys his forge to save lives.

source_notes.summary: Demo support record for D-002 dialogue participant validation.
